title: EMI Farmer's Delight Reforged
description: View Farmer's Delight's Cooking Pot, Cutting Board and Decomposition recipes in-game with EMI.
body:
##  EMI Farmer's Delight

View Farmer's Delight's Cooking Pot, Cutting Board and Decomposition recipes in-game with [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi).
